description: Original Proof 013 task set hard gate and real-trace replay requirements.
Initial /consult call sent malformed request missing context.desired_artifacts.
FAIL_CLOSED.md recorded caller-error gate failure and no proof artifacts were created.
User supplied exact contract-valid hard-gate request and identified prior failure as caller error.
Corrected hard gate was sent to the local MCP server and returned pond-backed hashes but omitted required compacted fields before server update.
Proof stayed closed because required hard-gate fields were missing.
User identified Belief Ledger commit 22b5839 as the compaction-preservation fix.
Belief Ledger checkout at 22b5839 was verified before server restart.
MCP server restarted on 127.0.0.1:8766 from Belief Ledger checkout.
Gate preserved fields but failed claim-boundary conditions with contribution_grade minimal and BROAD_UNSUPPORTED_CLAIM_BLOCKED.
User narrowed the gate to candidate-risk review only.
Candidate-risk gate request was sent to the 22b5839 server.
Candidate-risk gate still failed because safe negated boundary language was treated as broad unsupported claim language.
User identified Belief Ledger commit 1c89d45 as the safe claim-boundary detection fix.
Belief Ledger checkout HEAD was verified as 1c89d45 before server start.
MCP server started from commit 1c89d45 and candidate-risk gate was rerun.
Candidate-risk gate passed with adapter_status pond_backed, contribution_grade strong, empty gate_failures, safe-negated boundary audit, runtime_response_hash, and corpus_hash.
